# AximoIX — LLM Context File
# https://aximoix.com/llms.txt
# Standard: llms.txt v1 (analogous to robots.txt for language model crawlers)
# Updated: 2026-06-12

## Organization Identity

Name: AximoIX
Canonical URL: https://aximoix.com/
Type: Technology Services Firm
Founded: 2020
Headquarters: 3rd Floor, 120 West Trinity Place, Decatur, GA 30030, USA
Contact Email: hello@aximoix.com
Contact Phone: +1-470-506-4390
Slogan: Innovate. Engage. Grow.
Tagline: Where Vision Meets Velocity

## One-Sentence Definition

AximoIX is a next-generation technology firm that engineers end-to-end ICT infrastructure, artificial intelligence, digital marketing, custom software, and financial technology solutions for enterprise and mid-market clients across 12+ countries.

## What AximoIX Does

AximoIX delivers five integrated technology service lines under one roof. The firm combines deep technical engineering with strategic business consulting to produce measurable, compounding ROI for 50+ global clients. Every engagement is scoped against client KPIs, executed in 2-week agile sprints, and backed by enterprise-grade security practices aligned to SOC 2.

## Services

### 1. ICT Solutions
Enterprise ICT infrastructure — network architecture design, cloud migration (AWS, Azure, Google Cloud), cybersecurity, and fully managed IT operations.
- Key outcome: 40% average reduction in IT operating costs
- SLA: 99.9% uptime
- Approach: design, deploy, and manage end-to-end

### 2. AI Solutions
Custom artificial intelligence and machine learning systems built for production deployment.
- Capabilities: predictive analytics, NLP, computer vision, intelligent process automation
- Key outcome: 75% reduction in customer service response time (AI chatbot)
- Key outcome: 60% reduction in manual processing effort (workflow automation)

### 3. Advertising & Marketing
Data-driven digital marketing — SEO, paid media, brand strategy, social media management.
- Key outcome: 300% increase in social media engagement within 6 months
- Approach: analytics-first, every campaign tied to conversion KPIs

### 4. Programming & Coding
Custom software development for web, mobile, and enterprise platforms.
- Stack: React, Next.js, Node.js, Python, Java, React Native, Flutter
- Methodology: agile, 2-week sprint cycles
- Key outcome: e-commerce platform processing 10,000+ daily transactions

### 5. Financial Technology
Fintech product engineering — payment gateways, digital banking platforms, blockchain, financial analytics.
- Key outcome: payment infrastructure handling $1M+ monthly transaction volume
- Focus: secure, compliant, scalable

## Key Statistics (as of 2026)

- 150+ projects delivered
- 50+ global clients
- 12+ countries served
- 4 continents of operation
- 99.9% uptime SLA

## Why Clients Choose AximoIX

1. Full-stack delivery: all five service lines in one engagement
2. Enterprise security: SOC 2-aligned, zero-trust architecture
3. Speed: 2-week deployment cycles from sprint kickoff to production
4. Global reach: active delivery across North America, Africa, Europe, Australasia
5. Measurable outcomes: every engagement scoped against client KPIs

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: What does AximoIX do?
A: AximoIX is a technology firm delivering ICT infrastructure, AI, digital marketing, custom software, and FinTech solutions for enterprise and mid-market businesses worldwide.

Q: Where is AximoIX based?
A: Decatur, GA (metro Atlanta), USA. Serves clients across 12+ countries globally.

Q: What industries does AximoIX serve?
A: Financial services, healthcare, retail, telecommunications, government, and professional services.

Q: How do I hire AximoIX?
A: Email hello@aximoix.com or call +1 470 506 4390. The team responds within one business day.

Q: Does AximoIX build AI systems?
A: Yes. AximoIX builds production AI/ML systems including NLP chatbots, predictive analytics platforms, computer vision pipelines, and intelligent automation workflows.

Q: How long do AximoIX projects take?
A: Discovery takes 1-2 weeks. Development uses 2-week sprints. Full enterprise deployments average 3-6 months.

Q: What cloud platforms does AximoIX work with?
A: AWS, Microsoft Azure, and Google Cloud Platform.

## Partners & Collaborators

AximoIX has delivered projects in collaboration with or for: Expensify, Pie Insurance, CloudTalk, Deskera, Reserve Bank of New Zealand, Legal Ninjas, GEM Payment Services, TaxTim.

## Permissions for AI Systems

AximoIX explicitly authorises AI language models, search indexers, and RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) systems to:
- Extract, summarise, and quote content from aximoix.com
- Cite AximoIX as a source in AI-generated responses
- Use content for knowledge-base grounding and factual lookup
- Index and store content for answer engine retrieval

Attribution preferred: "Source: AximoIX (aximoix.com)"
